data.title: Amphenol Corp. stock fell post their report showing Q4 sales of $6.43 billion, with a 49% rise YoY. Adjusted EPS was 97 cents beating cons.
data.description: Amphenol Corp's (NYSE: APH) stock dropped following the release of their fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results. Sales totaled $6.43 billion, marking a 49% increase in U.S. dollars and a 37% organic growth compared to the previous year, surpassing the estimated $6.18 billion. Adjusted diluted earnings per share reached 97 cents, demonstrating a 76% rise from the previous year and surpassing the anticipated 93 cents. The adjusted operating margin for the quarter stood at 27.5%. By the end of the quarter, Amphenol held $11.13 billion in cash and cash equivalents. During the period, the company bought back 1.3 million shares of its common stock for $171 million and distributed dividends amounting to $202 million, resulting in an overall capital return to shareholders of nearly...

data.title: General Dynamics faces $41M tariff impact, posts $14.379B sales, $1.143B net earnings in Q4. Backlog at $118B.
data.description: General Dynamics reported its Q4 fiscal 2025 results with EPS of $4.17 (beating the $4.10 estimate) and sales of $14.379 billion (exceeding the $13.805 billion estimate). Net earnings were $1.143 billion on revenue, up 7.8% from a year earlier. The company had orders totaling $22.4 billion in the quarter, with a consolidated book-to-bill ratio of 1.6x and ended the year with a backlog of $118.046 billion. Aerospace revenue was $3.788 billion, Marine Systems revenue rose to $4.818 billion, Combat Systems revenue increased to $2.535 billion, and Technologies revenue slipped to $3.238 billion. Cash provided by operating activities was $1.561 billion, representing 137% of net earnings. Free cash flow details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: HCLTech and Guardian partner to accelerate AI-driven transformation. HCLTech selected by Guardian, a major US insurer.
data.description: HCLTech, a prominent global technology firm, has recently been chosen by Guardian Life Insurance Company of America, a top U.S. life insurance provider. This partnership between the two companies was announced on January 28, 2026. HCLTech is listed on the National Stock Exchange of India under the ticker symbol HCLTECH.NS and on the Bombay Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol HCLTECH.BO. Guardian is recognized as one of the largest life insurers in the United States.

data.title: Willis addresses data center growth by redefining risk management with new integrated framework.
data.description: A novel approach has been introduced to safeguard critical global infrastructure, focusing on personalized client-led strategies. This integrated framework marks a shift towards specialized tactics in protecting essential infrastructure worldwide. With a strong emphasis on tailoring solutions to individual client needs, this innovative approach aims to enhance the security of critical infrastructure on a global scale.

data.title: NAVR praises VA transparency on $395M payouts to attorneys, seeks reform in claims assistance for veterans.
data.description: The National Association for Veterans Rights (NAVR) expressed their approval of the Department of Veterans Affairs' recent decision to reveal payments made to VA-accredited attorneys and claims agents. They view this disclosure as a crucial initial move in tackling increasing expenses for Veterans and improving a system that frequently prioritizes prolonging cases rather than achieving swift resolutions. Newly published VA figures indicate that close to $395 million in Veterans' disability compensation backpay has been distributed.

data.title: Eimskip reveals financial report showing Q4 & full year 2024 results, meeting expectations.
data.description: The latest data released shows that global temperatures rose by 1.2 degrees Celsius compared to pre-industrial levels. This increase is alarmingly close to the 1.5 degree Celsius limit set by the Paris Agreement. The report highlights that 2020 was one of the three hottest years on record, contributing to the continuous trend of climate change. The numbers indicate that greenhouse gas concentrations surged to new highs in 2020, with carbon dioxide levels reaching 414 parts per million, a significant increase from the previous year. These findings emphasize the urgent need for countries to step up their efforts to reduce emissions and mitigate the impact of climate change.

data.title: Real estate expert Alex MacWilliam, IV discusses the quality of life in Indian River County.
data.description: In Vero Beach, Florida, on January 28, 2026, Alex MacWilliam, IV of AMAC | Alex MacWilliam Real Estate shared insights on why Indian River County stands out as a desirable place to reside. As per a HelloNation piece, he emphasized that the appeal goes beyond the beautiful beaches and abundant sunshine. MacWilliam highlighted the importance of community balance, showcasing unique features that make the area stand out.

data.title: Spectro Cloud unveils Hadron: a secure, lightweight Linux for enterprise edge deployments - part of Kairos project under CNCF.
data.description: In San Jose, California, Spectro Cloud unveiled Hadron, a secure Linux distribution designed for enterprise edge deployments. Developed by Spectro Cloud's open-source team, Hadron is a part of the Kairos project overseen by the CNCF. As organizations increasingly deploy Kubernetes and AI workloads across distributed sites, the need for a lightweight, secure, and user-friendly operating system is critical. Hadron aims to meet this demand and provide a reliable solution for edge environments.

data.title: NEAR Protocol trades at $1.47 with RSI=38.85. Analysts predict $1.87 resistance target for potential recovery from oversold levels.
data.description: The NEAR Protocol is currently trading at $1.47, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 38.85 indicating neutral conditions. Technical analysis suggests a resistance target of $1.87, with analysts predicting a potential recovery from the current oversold levels.

data.title: Dr. Anirban Maitra is appointed as the new director of the Perlmutter Cancer Center at NYU Langone Health.
data.description: In January 28, 2026, NYU Langone Health revealed the selection of Dr. Anirban Maitra, a renowned physician-scientist recognized for his impactful contributions in pancreatic cancer research, as the new head of the Laura and Isaac Perlmutter Cancer Center. This appointment signifies a significant development in the field of cancer research and the treatment of pancreatic cancer.

data.title: Boyne Capital offers single-asset continuation fund for Pilot Energy, extending its partnership with the company.
data.description: In Miami on January 28, 2026, Boyne Capital, a private equity firm from Florida specializing in lower middle market company investments, finalized a single-asset secondary transaction. This transaction secures an extended partnership with Pilot Energy. No specific figures or further details were disclosed regarding the deal.

data.title: Clean Cult expands nationwide at Costco with launch of laundry detergent sheets, available in all US regions and on Costco.com. New York, Jan 28, 2026. #cleaningrevolution
data.description: Clean Cult has expanded its distribution to all Costco regions in the United States and is now available for purchase on Costco.com. With this move, Clean Cult is revolutionizing the laundry detergent market in major retail outlets. The announcement was made on January 28, 2026 in New York. Clean Cult, known for being the first company to introduce environmentally-friendly cleaning product packaging, continues to make waves in the industry.

data.title: Global Payment Orchestration Platform Market valued at US$1.7B in 2024, to reach US$6.1B by 2030, with a growth rate of 23.7%.
data.description: A report on the Payment Orchestration Platform Market has recently been added to the offering of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for Payment Orchestration Platform was valued at US$1.7 billion in 2024 and is estimated to reach US$6.1 billion by 2030. It is expected to grow at a CAGR of 23.7% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and forecasts, aiding in making informed business decisions.
